relevantLearnings: GitHub issue comment signal [hang_deadlock] from seppegadeyne at https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/issues/34#issuecomment-4354129608: ## Roadmap gate after PR #49 PR #49 is merged and changed the benchmark interpretation: 100% on holdout/noisy was semantic-policy oracle coverage, not evidence of temporal/statefu…

GitHub related commit 3b6e19e54fd0: feat: analyze benchmark metrics (#40) Add benchmark analysis exports for CSV summaries, scenario-type breakdowns, approximate significance checks, and PNG visualizations.\n\nCloses #32 (https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/commit/3b6e19e54fd0be9d982f09bb91c9585226b81e38)

GitHub related commit 8b7074bb6bfb: Release v0.1.0: Neuraxon v2.0 Intelligence Tissue (#26) * Phase 1: Repo opschonen en nieuwe projectstructuur opzetten (#2) - Verwijder oude evaluatie-content: benchmarks/, dashboard/, data/, docs/, logs/, plugins/, sidecar/, scripts/ (behalve smoke_v1_v2.py en run_upstream_tests_no_pytest.py) - Wis oude toplevel documentatie en CI workflow - Maak src/neuraxon_agent/ package met __init__, tissue, perception, action, modulation, memory, evolution - Maak tests/ en examples/ directories - Voeg pyproject.toml toe met hatchling build, ruff, mypy, pytest - Schrijf nieuwe README.md met projectdoel en installatie - Update .gitignore voor Python project - Voeg .github/workflows/ci.yml toe met lint + imports check Verificatie: ruff, mypy en voorbeeldscript slagen lokaal. Closes #2 * ci: add test workflow to debug runner issues * feat(vendor): integrate Neuraxon v2.0 as git submodule with fallback (#17) - Add DavidVivancos/Neuraxon as git submodule under upstream/Neuraxon - Remove upstream/Neuraxon from .gitignore so submodule is tracked - Create src/neuraxon_agent/vendor/ shim package - __init__.py tries submodule first, falls back to bundled copy - Bundled neuraxon2.py vendor copy for offline/air-gapped use - Update CI to verify vendor imports and smoke test upstream v1/v2 - Document update process in README * test: add smoke test for Neuraxon v2.0 vendor integration (#4) * feat(perception): implement PerceptionEncoder for agent observations -> trinary input encoding (#18) - Add PerceptionEncoder class with categorical, numerical, and sequential encoding - Map tool results, error types, session context, environment status, and previous outcomes to {-1, 0, +1} - Support configurable num_input_neurons and thresholds - Add encode_sequential for trend-aware encoding - Export PerceptionEncoder from __init__ - Add comprehensive unit tests (51 tests, all passing) - Verify encoder output integrates with NeuraxonNetwork.set_input_states() Closes #5 * feat(action): implement ActionDecoder for trinary output -> agent actions (#19) - Add AgentAction dataclass with actie_type, confidence, raw_output - Implement ActionDecoder with basis (1 neuron) and multi-neuron modes - Add confidence scoring: 1.0 for exact patterns, scaled fallback otherwise - Ensure determinism and full coverage of all trinary combinations - Add comprehensive unit tests (32 tests, all passing) - Retain legacy Action class for backward compatibility Closes #6 * feat(tissue): implement AgentTissue wrapper for NeuraxonNetwork runtime (#7) (#20) - AgentTissue with observe(), think(), modulate(), save(), load() - Integrates PerceptionEncoder and ActionDecoder - TissueState dataclass for observable state - Tests for init, observe, think, modulate, save/load, state * feat(modulation): Phase 3 neuromodulator feedback loop (#21) - Implement ModulationFeedback class with configurable outcome-to-modulator mapping - Add adaptive mapping with exponential moving average convergence - Couple ModulationFeedback to AgentTissue.modulate() - Fix get_all_states() dict flattening bug in TissueState - Fix test_tissue_think to match actual ActionDecoder action types - Add comprehensive tests for feedback loop and adaptive convergence - Document modulation effects in README Acceptance criteria: - After modulate('success') dopamine level is increased - After modulate('failure') serotonin level is decreased - Adaptive mapping converges to stable values - Network behavior changes measurably after repeated feedback Closes #8 * feat(memory): implement TissueMemory with pattern storage/recall (#22) - Add TissueMemory class using NeuraxonApplication pattern storage/recall - store_experience(obs, action, outcome) encodes obs as trinary pattern - recall_similar(obs) finds closest patterns by Hamming distance - Forgetting: strength decay + pruning below threshold/capacity - Couple TissueMemory to AgentTissue with store_experience/recall_similar - AgentTissue save/load now persists memory state alongside network - Keep legacy Memory class for backward compatibility - Add comprehensive tests (18 cases, all passing) Closes #9 * feat(evolution): implement AgentEvolution with Aigarth hybrid training (#10) (#23) - AgentEvolution wrapping NeuraxonAigarthHybrid - Configurable task scenarios for tool-selection training - Fitness evaluation with reproduceerbaarheid (seed) - save/load persistence - 6 tests * feat(cli): implement Hermes-compatible JSON CLI interface (#11) (#24) - neuraxon-agent CLI with think/modulate/evolve/save/load commands - JSON in/out handlers - Base64 state serialisation - argparse subcommands - 5 CLI tests * feat: streaming, persistence, end-to-end tests, en documentatie (#12-15) (#25) - StreamingLoop voor real-time agent simulatie - Persistence helpers voor state save/load - End-to-end smoke tests (observe-think-modulate-memory-evolution) - README update met architectuur en voorbeelden - Closes #12, #13, #14, #15 (https://github.com/sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid/commit/8b7074bb6bfbfad49e277bc15c45ca4cbd69a19a)

executionGoal: Work on GitHub issue #34 in sisutuulenisa/neuraxon-hybrid (live) If scope appears broad or ambiguous, decompose it into bounded phases and keep implementing from highest confidence to lowest confidence. Before coding, fetch the live GitHub issue body/comments and treat acceptance criteria/checklists as mandatory. Only return ambiguous_requirement after documenting why no safe minimal phase can be executed.
successCriteria: Live GitHub issue body and comments reviewed before implementation.
Acceptance criteria/checklist items translated into an explicit implementation checklist.
Implementation and verification evidence address all checklist items.
stopConditions: If decomposition still yields no safe bounded phase, stop with a concrete blocker explanation and next-step plan.
